title: Private AOS Mirror Max
summary: A Cloudflare Access-gated CJ Cinco mirror of the local Aligned OS command dashboard, exported through a redacted snapshot layer.
accessPlan: Cloudflare Access protects the dashboard route and nested dashboard paths before static content loads.
The dashboard stays on the existing CJ Cinco Cloudflare Pages project.
The route remains absent from the public homepage, nav, footer, robots file, and sitemap.
The Next.js app does not implement a separate login system.
sourceContract: Read only the bounded AOS generated dashboard snapshot, root command summaries, CJ Cinco lane summaries, and approved Wealth dashboard summary.
Export AOS structure, goals, pressure, support gaps, coaching, queue counts, projection freshness, and summary metrics.
Do not export raw communications, contact records, local source paths, account details, credentials, private records, or raw evidence.
Fail the build if deterministic leak checks find contact patterns, local paths, long account-like numbers, raw communication markers, or credential markers.
